1020: [Color:0xc]◆Summary[Color:0x0]
A Domain constructed by En no Ozuno, regarded
as an echo of the Expanse. As such, time flows
differently within the domain. It is used as a
training ground for potential messiahs, but also
serves as a refuge for those seeking asylum from
the human realm.
[END]
1030: [Color:0xc]◆Summary[Color:0x0]
The 18−year−old protagonist of Shin Megami
Tensei I. Once a normal high schooler, his
destiny was forever changed when he found
himself caught in a war between gods and
demons.
[END]
1040: [Color:0xc]◆Summary[Color:0x0]
The protagonist of Shin Megami Tensei II.
Discovered by a trainer at Tokyo Millennium
and taught to be a gladiator.
[END]
1050: [Color:0xc]◆Summary[Color:0x0]
The 18−year−old protagonist of Shin Megami
Tensei III: Nocturne. Once an ordinary high
schooler, he was transformed into a demon
in the Vortex World, where he continues
to fight alone.
[END]
1060: [Color:0xc]Summary[Color:0x0]
Sometimes cooperates with those who pursue the
middle path, though he is a neutral party
himself. Stephen is not a normal human since
he is able to travel in the Expanse, the
Diamond Realm, and even dreams. Current
speculation states Stephen is a being from a
higher dimension who can influence parallel
universes. His real name is unknown−−”Stephen”
is said to be an assumed name.
[Color:0xc]Age/Sex[Color:0x0]
Unknown/Male
[Color:0xc]Activity[Color:0x0]
In 2038, Stephen hacked into the Ministry of
Defense and, with the use of the same technology
used to create the Yamato Perpetual Reactor,
developed the Demon Summoning Program. He then
distributed the program across the Internet to
aid humanity against the demon threat. Following
God's Plan, Stephen joined the Goddess of Tokyo
to help guide the city's messiahs toward the
middle path. Stephen's agenda remains unclear.

[Color:0x5]This entry may have been written by a
biased party.[Color:0x0]
[Color:0x5]*More Data Needed[Color:0x0]
[END]
